hero.label: Stay connected
hero.title: Join the community chat
hero.lead: Share what you're building, get help with your local AI setup, and stay across the latest open models.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.lead: We use Superbridge to connect multiple messaging apps into one group. Pick whichever platform you're already on, and your messages will reach everyone on all the others.

subscribe.label: Stay in the loop
subscribe.title: Get notified
subscribe.lead: We'll let you know when new platforms come online, and when the first event is announced.
